name: io.github.Braynexservices/nigeria-quidax-crypto
description: Live crypto tickers in Naira (BTC/NGN etc.) from Quidax. Read-only, keyless, no trading.

environmentVariables.name: CRYPTO_PROVIDER
environmentVariables.description: Provider selector — "mock" (default, offline synthetic) or "quidax" for live data (keyless).
